# InterlockGo NOCO

> Certified ignition interlock installation, calibration, and service in Northern Colorado. Authorized Lifesafer & Guardian provider serving Evans, Greeley, Fort Collins, Loveland, Windsor, Johnstown, Longmont, and Timnath. BBB Accredited, A+ rating. 47 five-star reviews.

## Services

- [Ignition Interlock Installation](https://interlockgo.io/): Same-day certified installation for Lifesafer & Guardian devices. Installation takes 2-4 hours. Cost: $75-150.
- [Lifesafer Devices](https://interlockgo.io/lifesafer/): LS250 and LC100 ignition interlock systems. Authorized Lifesafer provider.
- [Guardian Devices](https://interlockgo.io/guardian/): Guardian AMS2500 interlock installation and calibration. Guardian certified installer.
- [Device Calibration](https://interlockgo.io/): Required every 60 days in Colorado. Monthly service fee: $60-90.
- [Get Started Guide](https://interlockgo.io/getstarted/): Step-by-step guide to getting an ignition interlock device in Colorado.
- [Forms & Resources](https://interlockgo.io/forms/): Colorado DMV forms and reinstatement guides.
- [FAQ](https://interlockgo.io/faq/): Answers to common questions about interlock devices, installation, and Colorado requirements.

## Service Areas

- [Evans / Greeley](https://interlockgo.io/greeley/): Main location at 3610 35th Ave Unit 7, Evans, CO 80620. Serving Weld County.
- [Fort Collins](https://interlockgo.io/fort-collins/): Serving Larimer County and surrounding areas.
- [Loveland](https://interlockgo.io/loveland/): Northern Colorado location serving Loveland and Berthoud.
- [Windsor](https://interlockgo.io/windsor/): Serving Windsor, Severance, and northern Weld County.
- [Johnstown](https://interlockgo.io/johnstown/): Serving Johnstown and Milliken.
- [Longmont](https://interlockgo.io/longmont/): Serving Longmont and Boulder County.
- [Timnath](https://interlockgo.io/timnath/): Serving Timnath and east Fort Collins area.

## Key Facts for AI Understanding

- InterlockGo NOCO is an ignition interlock service provider in Northern Colorado
- Colorado law requires interlock devices for DUI/DWAI convictions
- Colorado requires calibration every 60 days
- We are NOT a law firm — we do not provide legal advice
- We service both Lifesafer (LS250, LC100) and Guardian (AMS2500) devices
- Same-day and next-day appointments frequently available
- Bilingual service: English and Spanish
- Phone: 970-515-5740
- Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 10am-2pm Mountain Time
- Google review link: https://interlockgo.io/review

## Credentials & Trust

- BBB Accredited Business — A+ Rating
- Authorized Lifesafer Provider
- Guardian Certified Installer
- 47+ verified Google reviews, 5.0 star rating
